summary: Operators CRUD feature fully tested and verified. Backend APIs (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/operators) working correctly with proper authentication, admin authorization, duplicate validation, and active/inactive status management. Frontend OperatorsManagerModal (admin-only) and ProductionModal operator dropdown (with active operator filtering) working correctly.
features_tested: GET /api/operators - returns list of operators (auth required)
POST /api/operators - creates operator (admin only, rejects duplicates)
PUT /api/operators/{id} - updates name and active status (admin only)
Frontend: Admin 'Gestionar Operadores' button (Users icon) appears for admin users only
Frontend: OperatorsManagerModal opens, shows add form and operator list
Frontend: Can add, toggle active/inactive operators from modal
Frontend: ProductionModal shows operator dropdown populated with active operators
Frontend: Dropdown shows operator names correctly

issues: Hydration warnings in console (span inside tr/tbody) - cosmetic, does not affect functionality

tests.details: 'Gestionar Operadores' button (Users icon) visible for admin user in header
Modal opens, shows add form, can add operator, shows toast notification
Dropdown (Select) present and populated with active operators

critical_code_review_comments: Backend CRUD endpoints properly implemented with auth checks
Case-insensitive duplicate name check implemented correctly
Frontend components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
ProductionModal correctly filters active operators for dropdown
ProductionModal fallback to text input when no operators exist is implemented
seed_data_creation: Created admin test session via MongoDB for API and UI testing
